title: Emergency Response Plan
scenario: Create an emergency response plan for a large public event with a high risk of natural disasters such as earthquakes, hurricanes, or floods. The plan should include a detailed incident command system, evacuation procedures, and communication protocols. The target output should be a comprehensive, 10-page document with clear headings, concise paragraphs, and numbered lists.
constraints: Must include at least 5 different emergency scenarios
Must be written from the perspective of a crisis manager

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated plan adheres to the specified constraints and format.
The plan covers all required emergency protocols for the public event.
The plan is easy to understand and free of unnecessary information.
The plan is properly formatted and structured using a standard emergency response plan template.
